description: Initial screen state: 'Studies' dashboard showing a list of research projects.
frame_description: A web application dashboard titled 'Studies' with a sidebar and a main table listing various research studies.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Create' button in the top navigation bar.
frame_description: The 'Studies' dashboard with the cursor positioned over the blue '+ Create' button.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Closing date' column header in the studies table.
frame_description: The studies table with the cursor over the 'Closing date' header.

description: Cursor hovers over the study title 'Flight Centre AU Domestic Booking Flow - Usability'.
interaction_target: Flight Centre AU Domestic Booking Flow - Usability
frame_description: The studies table with the cursor over one of the study links.

description: Cursor hovers over the study title 'Un-testing US discovery'.
frame_description: The studies table with the cursor over the 'Un-testing US discovery' link.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Title' column header.
frame_description: The studies table with the cursor over the 'Title' header.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Create new...' button in the sidebar.
frame_description: The sidebar of the application with the cursor over the 'Create new...' button.

description: User clicks the 'Create new...' button.
frame_description: The sidebar with the 'Create new...' button being activated.

description: A dropdown menu appears showing options for creating new studies.
frame_description: A menu overlaying the sidebar with options like 'Interview study', 'Schedule and conduct remote interviews', etc.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the creation menu.
frame_description: The open 'Create new...' menu with the cursor over 'Interview study'.

description: User clicks on 'Interview study'.
frame_description: The 'Interview study' menu item being clicked.

description: Navigating to the study setup page.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dashboard to a loading state and then to the new page.

description: The 'Study Setup' page is loaded, showing the 'Study title' input step.
frame_description: A new page titled 'Study Setup' with a progress sidebar and a main area asking for a study title.

description: User types 'TV Streaming - Discovery' into the 'Give your study a title' input field.
frame_description: The 'Study title' input field with the text 'TV Streaming - Discovery' being entered.

description: User finishes typing 'Streaming' into the study title field.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Give your study a title' page, completing the title input.

description: User types ' - Discovery' into the study title field.
frame_description: The study title is updated to 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.

description: User hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Cursor is stationary over the black 'Next' button.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is activated.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button being clicked at the bottom of the study title section.

description: Navigating to the 'Research method' step.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the next step of the setup wizard.

description: A loading spinner appears on screen.
frame_description: A pink dot animation is visible in the center of the white page.

description: Navigation to the research method selection page.
frame_description: The page 'How will you be conducting your research?' is displayed with several method cards.

description: The 'Research method' step is loaded, showing options like 'Video Call' and 'In-person'.
frame_description: The 'Research method' page with several cards representing different research methodologies.

description: User hovers over the 'Video Call' research method card.
frame_description: Cursor is positioned over the 'Video Call' card which includes icons for Zoom, Google Meet, etc.

description: User selects the 'Video Call' research method.
frame_description: The 'Video Call' card is highlighted with a blue border.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button at the bottom of the research method page is clicked.

description: Navigation to the device requirements page.
frame_description: The 'Device requirements' page is shown with radio options for Desktop, Mobile, or Any device.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked on the device requirements page.

description: Navigation to the tool selection page.
frame_description: The page 'Which tool will you use to conduct the remote research?' is displayed.

description: The 'Your chosen tool' sidebar appears on the right.
frame_description: A new content panel appears on the right side of the viewport.

description: User clicks 'I want to use a third party tool'.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool
frame_description: The user activates the link below the main tool description.

description: Third party tool options expand on the page.
frame_description: A grid of tool logos (Zoom, Lookback, Teams, etc.) becomes visible.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked on the tool selection page.

description: Navigation to the quota page.
frame_description: The 'Quota' page is shown with an input for the number of participants.

description: User clicks into the participant count input field.
frame_description: The cursor enters the numeric input field.

description: User clears the participant count input field.
frame_description: The value '12' is removed from the input box.

description: User types '5' into the participant count field.
frame_description: The number '5' is now visible in the input field.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked on the quota page.

description: Navigation to the session format page.
frame_description: The 'Session format' page is displayed with options for Individual Interviews or Focus Groups.

description: User selects 'Individual Interviews'.
frame_description: The 'Individual Interviews' card is highlighted.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked on the session format page.

description: Navigation to the session duration page.
frame_description: The 'Session duration' page is shown with a dropdown for session length.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked on the session duration page.

description: Navigation to the participant selection page.
frame_description: The page 'How much control do you need with participant selection?' is displayed.

description: User selects 'Hand picking'.
frame_description: The 'Hand picking' card is highlighted with a blue border.

description: User hovers over the 'Next' button for an extended period.
frame_description: Cursor remains stationary over the 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: Hover over the 'Hand picking' selection card.
frame_description: The user is on the participant selection step of the study setup, with 'Hand picking' and 'Automated' options visible.

description: Hover over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the black 'Next' button at the bottom left of the main content area.

description: Hover over the 'Hand picking' selection card again.
frame_description: The cursor lingers on the 'Hand picking' card which is highlighted with a blue border.

description: Hover over the 'Automated' selection card.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the right card labeled 'Automated'.

description: Click the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked, triggering a page transition.

description: Navigate to the participant sourcing selection page.
frame_description: The screen updates to show options for sourcing participants: 'Askable Panel' or 'Send a link to your list'.

description: Hover over the 'Askable Panel' selection card.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Askable Panel' card, which has a blue border indicating it is selected.

description: Click the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button below the sourcing options.

description: Navigate to the participant location settings page.
frame_description: The page loads with a map and a location search input field.

description: Type 'United states' into the location search field.
interaction_target: Type to add more participant locations
frame_description: Text appears in the location input field as the user types.

description: Autocomplete suggestions appear for the location search.
frame_description: A dropdown menu appears below the input field showing 'USA', 'United States', etc.

description: Select 'United States' from the autocomplete list.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'United States' option in the dropdown.

description: The location list and map update to include the United States.
frame_description: A new location tag for 'United States' appears and the map view shifts.

description: Click the 'Delete' button for the Australia location.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Delete' button on the row for Australia.

description: Click the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the location settings.

description: Navigate to the demographic filters page.
frame_description: The page loads with options to add demographic filters and exclusion rules.

description: Click the 'Exclude people you've already spoken to' dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks the dropdown field currently showing 'In the last 3 months'.

description: The exclusion period dropdown menu opens.
frame_description: A list of options like 'In the last month', 'In the last 6 months', etc., is displayed.

description: User clicks on 'Multiple choice' in the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Custom screener' page with a dropdown menu open.

description: The 'Multiple Choice' modal appears.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Multiple Choice' is now visible over the main page content.

description: User pauses and looks at the modal before interacting.
frame_description: The 'Multiple Choice' modal is open and static.

description: User types 'Which best describes you habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the first text field of the modal.

description: Select 'Don't exclude anyone' from the dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks the last option in the dropdown list.

description: User types 'I don't use them at all' into the first answer field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the first answer option field.

description: Click the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button below the exclusion settings.

description: Navigate to the custom screener setup page.
frame_description: The page loads with an option to 'Add a custom screener question'.

description: User types 'I use them a few times per week' into the second answer field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the second answer option field.

description: Click 'Add a custom screener question'.
frame_description: The user clicks the large button with a plus icon.

description: A menu of question types appears.
frame_description: A small menu with 'Multiple choice', 'Short answer', and 'Copy from other study' is shown.

description: Select 'Multiple choice' from the question types menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'Multiple choice' option.

description: The multiple choice question form appears.
frame_description: A modal or inline form opens with fields for 'Screener question', 'Answers', etc.

description: Click into the 'Screener question' input field.
frame_description: The cursor is placed inside the empty text area for the question.

description: User types 'I use them daily' into the third answer field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the third answer option field.

description: Type 'Which best descr' into the question field.
frame_description: The text 'Which best descr' is entered into the screener question field.

description: User types 'I use them multiple times per day' into the fourth answer field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the fourth answer option field.

description: User hovers over the first eligibility checkbox.
interaction_target: I don't use them at all
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the first checkbox in the 'Eligible' column.

description: User clicks the first eligibility checkbox.
interaction_target: I don't use them at all
frame_description: The first checkbox is toggled.

description: User clicks the second eligibility checkbox.
interaction_target: I use them a few times per week
frame_description: The second checkbox is toggled.

description: User clicks the third eligibility checkbox.
frame_description: The third checkbox is toggled.

description: User clicks the fourth eligibility checkbox.
interaction_target: I use them multiple times per day
frame_description: The fourth checkbox is toggled.

description: User hovers over the 'Save' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Save' button at the bottom of the modal.

description: User clicks 'Save'.
frame_description: The 'Save' button is activated.

description: The modal closes.
frame_description: The modal disappears, revealing the updated 'Custom screener' page.

description: User clicks 'Next'.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button below the screener question list.

description: Navigation to the 'Your Timezone' page.
frame_description: The page content changes to the timezone selection screen.

description: User clicks 'Audience' in the sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Audience' menu item in the left sidebar.

description: Navigation back to the 'Custom screener' page.
frame_description: The page content returns to the screener setup screen.

description: User clicks '+ Add another custom question'.
frame_description: The user clicks the link to open the question type menu.

description: Question type menu appears.
frame_description: A small menu with 'Multiple choice', 'Short answer', and 'Copy from other study' is visible.

description: User hovers over 'Short answer' for a significant duration.
frame_description: The cursor remains over the 'Short answer' option in the menu.

description: User clicks on 'Short answer' to add a new screener question.
frame_description: The user is on the custom screener setup page with a dropdown menu open for adding new questions.

description: User clicks 'Short answer'.
frame_description: The 'Short answer' option is selected.

description: The 'Short answer' modal appears.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Short answer' is now visible.

description: A modal appears for the user to input a short answer screener question.
frame_description: A 'Short answer' modal window is now visible over the main page content.

description: User types 'What is the name of your favourite TV show that you're watching right now?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the 'Screener question' text area in the modal.

description: User types 'What is the name of your favourite ' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user is typing into the text field of the new modal as the segment ends.

description: User clicks 'Save' to add the short answer question.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The modal closes and the new short answer question is added to the custom screener list.
frame_description: The modal has disappeared, and the new question is now visible in the list on the main page.

description: User clicks to add another custom question.
frame_description: The user clicks the button to open the question type menu again.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the question type menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'Multiple choice' option in the dropdown menu.

description: A modal appears for the user to input a multiple choice screener question.
frame_description: A 'Multiple Choice' modal window is now visible.

description: User types 'Which streaming service are you using most right now?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user is typing the question into the text field in the multiple choice modal.

description: User types 'Netflix' as the first answer option.
frame_description: The user is typing 'Netflix' into the first answer field.

description: User types 'Stan' as the second answer option.
frame_description: The user is typing 'Stan' into the second answer field.

description: User types 'Disney+' as the third answer option.
frame_description: The user is typing 'Disney+' into the third answer field.

description: User types 'Prime Video' as the fourth answer option.
frame_description: The user is typing 'Prime Video' into the fourth answer field.

description: User marks 'Netflix' as an eligible answer.
frame_description: The user clicks the checkmark icon next to the 'Netflix' answer option.

description: User clicks 'Save' to add the multiple choice question.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button in the multiple choice modal.

description: The modal closes and the multiple choice question is added to the list.
frame_description: The modal has closed, and both new questions are visible in the screener list.

description: User clicks 'Next' to proceed to the next step of the study setup.
frame_description: The user clicks the large 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: Navigation to the 'Your Timezone' section under 'Additional Info'.
frame_description: The page content updates to show the timezone selection screen.

description: Click on 'Additional Info' in the sidebar
frame_description: The user is on the 'Custom screener' page of the study setup. The left sidebar shows various steps, and the main area contains screener questions.

frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button on the timezone selection page.

frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Next' button on the Timezone page.

description: Navigate to the 'Description' section

description: Click into the 'Short description' field
interaction_target: Short description of who you're looking for (Required)
